_notes: Each segment's text is sized to fit its caption window (built/sub/live-demo.ass) at ~140 wpm. Per-segment files let us anchor each VO to its visual moment in Composition.tsx — no drift.

segments.intro-hook: When a transaction fails on Portaldot, this is what the chain returns.
segments.intro-no-fix: No name. No message. No fix.
segments.intro-what: What if you could just decode it?
segments.intro-install: Pip install portaldot-pdk. Let me show you.
segments.demo-problem: When a Portaldot transaction fails, the chain returns a raw code with no name and no fix.
segments.demo-install: pdk decodes those codes. Install it from PyPI in one command — pip install portaldot-pdk. Version zero point one point six, already public.
segments.demo-doctor: First — pdk doctor. It checks node health, runtime version, pallet count, and contract compatibility.
segments.demo-accounts: pdk accounts shows pre-funded development accounts. Alice, Bob, Charlie — each holds fifty thousand POT. POT is the native token, used to pay gas.
segments.demo-pallets: pdk pallets lists every module on the chain.
segments.demo-storage: pdk storage reads any chain value. Here, the current block number.
segments.demo-keys: pdk keys inspects addresses in SS58 format — Portaldot's standard.
segments.demo-simulate: pdk simulate predicts a transaction's cost and feasibility before you send it. Built from the real fee oracle.
segments.demo-send: pdk send fires a real on-chain transfer. One POT from Alice to Bob, gas paid in POT, no mocks.
segments.demo-seed: pdk seed funds extra dev accounts from a YAML fixture — Dave, Eve, Ferdie. Useful for integration tests that need realistic starting state.
segments.demo-debug: Now the hero feature. pdk debug submits a real failing transaction, and decodes it. The verified panel names the error and shows you exactly how to fix it.
segments.demo-explain: pdk explain decodes the raw module-and-error code itself. Nothing else in the Portaldot ecosystem does this.
segments.demo-fix: pdk debug with the fix flag does both — diagnose the failure, then automatically submit the corrected transaction.
segments.demo-report: pdk report groups recent failures by type — triage at a glance.
segments.demo-watch: pdk watch streams chain events live. Filter by pallet to focus on what matters.
segments.demo-aisetup: And pdk ai-setup is a wizard for the optional AI layer. That is all fourteen commands.
segments.outro: Fourteen commands. Real POT gas. Zero mocks. pdk is on PyPI today — pip install portaldot-pdk. The standard Portaldot dev toolkit. Vote pdk.
